from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings


class DatabaseSettings(BaseSettings):
    host: str = "localhost"
    port: int = 5432
    username: str
    password: str

    model_config = {"extra": "forbid"}


class RedisSettings(BaseSettings):
    host: str = "localhost"
    port: int = 6379
    db: int = 0

    model_config = {"extra": "forbid"}


class AppSettings(BaseSettings):
    database_url: str
    api_key: str
    debug: bool = False
    log_level: str = "INFO"

    model_config = {"env_prefix": "APP_", "extra": "forbid"}
